title: Disney Encanto
features: ISABELA FROM DISNEY’S ENCANTO MOVIE: Inspired by Disney’s Encanto! Relive your favourite scenes and story moments!
SIGNATURE FASHION: Isabela Madrigal’s dress features authentic film details and designs
ICONIC ACCESSORIES: Includes iconic flower hairclip, delicate earrings, and espadrille shoes to complete Isabela’s signature look
AUTHENTIC HAIRSTYLE: Doll features Isabela’s gorgeously long flowing hairstyle from the film for added play
COLLECT THE MADRIGALS: Collect Isabela’s family members, Dolores, Mirabel, Luisa, and Bruno!
Contents: 1 Doll, 1 Doll Dress, 1 Flower Hair Clip, 1 Pair of Doll Shoes
Suggested for girls ages 3 years and up
